title: rhododendron dichroanthum var. scyphocalyx
intro: Rhododendron dichroanthum var. scyphocalyx is a lesser-known species of rhododendron, which is a type of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron dichroanthum var. scyphocalyx are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of a tea or infusion, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
